content.body: Greetings all.  I hope to make the call on Wednesday, but I managed to get sick and am still recovering. Apologies for being behind (compounded by a work emergency last week).
I have sent a pull request for memory safety, though it was against main not main_publish where it looks like the other PRs are going now? So I'll rebase and resubmit later.

I also did manage to get a colleague to look at the extensions provisions, and recorded their feedback here: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1F8hyqsF1--6TRjshc8P_1DQzL5rEmKotUCDb3WAFMRM/edit?usp=sharing
I also submitted some official comments for the Annex K meeting yesterday, but I didn't make it nor have caught up with it yet :/
